## Summary
A clear description of the feature you'd like.

## Motivation
Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution
How should it work? Include example `.purp` syntax if applicable:
```
// example Purp code showing the feature
```

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative solutions you've considered.

## Additional Context
Any other information (mockups, related issues, similar features in other tools).
